data.revised_prompt:
Create one clean HD 2D game sprite animation sheet for a fantasy RPG enemy. Canvas composition: exactly a 2x2 grid of four equal invisible cells, read left-to-right across rows, with no visible borders or grid lines. Background must be a perfectly solid flat chroma-key magenta #FF00FF with no texture, gradient, shadow, floor, or extra elements.

Subject: a training dummy enemy for "Samsara Ascension" — straw and wood practice puppet with red cloth talisman strips, a simple round target mark on the torso, short wooden arms, compact readable silhouette, clean hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, not photorealistic, not 3D, not pixel art. Keep the identity identical in all four frames: same palette, same costume/material language, same core face/target mark, same proportions.

Animation: walk cycle. Each of the four frames must show real body pose changes, not camera movement, scaling, glow, or sliding. Frame sequence: top-left first stride with the front/leading side moving forward and body leaning in travel direction; top-right passing step with body rising and rear/trailing side catching up, cloth strips trailing slightly backward; bottom-left opposite stride with the other side moving forward and clear weight shift; bottom-right passing step returning toward neutral with body lowering slightly so the loop reads as movement.

View/framing: full body visible in each cell, three-quarter RPG view from slightly above, centered in each cell, stable bottom/feet anchor line when grounded, same body height and same scale in every frame. The subject should fill about 58–66% of each cell with generous magenta margin. Ensure containment: all parts including arms, cloth strips, and any tiny attached aura remain fully inside each cell, with nothing crossing edges.

Style: clean HD hand-painted 2D fantasy RPG sprite, crisp readable silhouette, subtle fantasy game art shading, no text, no labels, no numbers, no UI, no watermark, no borders, no extra characters, no cropped body parts, no alternate forms.
